Graduate School

MENU

Your Gateway to Business Life

Istanbul Okan University’s Graduate School invites you to engage in inquiry, research, learning, and application alongside its national and international stakeholders.

With distinguished faculty members across the social sciences, health sciences, and engineering and natural sciences, the Graduate School designs its programs through a multidisciplinary framework that integrates theory with practice. Emphasizing active learning, project-based work, and continuous improvement, our programs foster both intellectual rigor and professional competence.

Our modular on-campus and distance education programs—featuring elective courses aligned with the demands of contemporary professional life—offer one of the most comprehensive academic portfolios in Turkey. Guided by the vision of “The University Closest to Business Life,” we provide working professionals with opportunities to deepen their expertise and advance their careers through close partnerships with industry.

Our foremost objective is to cultivate scholars and professionals who are productive, proficient, creative, confident, and adaptable to change in both national and international arenas.

We warmly invite you to join our academic community - one enriched by the experience and institutional culture of Istanbul Okan University, a pioneering institution in Türkiye that continually strengthens its academic and practical capacities, prioritizes engagement with the business world and its stakeholders, and embraces lifelong, collaborative learning.

Prof. Ahmet Selamoğlu
